历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 7502 → 13261 → 14781 → 17286 → 16678, showing a significant downward trend overall, with a jump of about 5759 places in 2022 followed by high-level fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is about 16678, a slight increase of about 608 places compared to 2024; the enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province for Physics Category was 103 → 103 → 105 → 111 from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 99 in 2025, and further reduced to 95 in 2026, a decrease of 4 students (about -4.0%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and provides momentum for ranking improvement.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is about 58th in 2026, with stable rankings in the 52–61 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the reputation evaluation for the 2025–2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'clearly negative', mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (deputy dean dismissed for extramarital affair, mistakenly hanging the Rising Sun flag, etc.), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 69th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms; Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, with deep foundations in teacher training and humanities and social sciences, providing stable appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.); the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 299,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 297,258 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16678, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-4.0%) slightly easing competition, negative reputation incidents possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will move slightly forward (ranking number decreases), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 16324, in the range of 15824–16824.

预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 2302 in 2025, the significant reduction in the 2026 plan (-30.8%) which significantly alleviates competition, and the negative reputation incident that may suppress some application enthusiasm, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be significantly higher (ranking number decreases) than in 2025.
